title: BAF_Protocol_007a Chloroform/Methanol Precipitation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"92s3o","text":"This protocol extends BAF_Protocol_007 as an alternative to acetone precipitation (normal method). The chloroform/methanol precipitation is a better method if the sample is high in lipid or other hydrophobic small molecules. This method also produces a protein pellet and not the normal liquid interface and as such is easier.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"7746q","text":"This precipitation would be substituted in for the acetone precipitation normally used in BAF_Protocol_007.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"2kua1","text":"Pre-cleaned microtubes 1.5 mL - SEAL-RITE‱ 1.5 ML MICROCENTRIFUGE TUBES color: natural, USA Scientific","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"blorn","text":"Pipette tips - Fisher Brand, yellow, part number: 02-681-151","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"41imh","text":"ABC - Fluka analytical Ammonium Bicarbonate, Sigma Aldrich, 09830-500G","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6uf4t","text":"VWR Analog Vortex mixer - CAT No: 58816-121","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4b12v","text":"Centrifuge 5427 R, Eppendorf","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e4r9u","text":"Water - Fisher Chemical, W6-4, Optima LC/MS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ijbr","text":"Methanol - A456-212, Methanol, optima LC/MS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a2hem","text":"Chloroform - AC423550010, ACS Grade 99.8+%","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 100 uL of protein extract of sample added to Eppendorf tube.
400 uL of Methanol was added, vortexed well.
200 uL of Chloroform was added, vortexed well.
300 uL of Water was added, vortexed well.
Sample was centrifuged at 13,000 rpm for 2 minutes
The upper layer was carefully removed (not disturbing the protein interface).
300 uL of Methanol was added, vortexed well.
Samples were centrifuged at 13,000 rpm, for 2 minutes.
Supernatants were discarded and the protein pellet was air dried. Resuspend in 100 mM Ammonium Bicarbonate in volume based on protein amount.
creator: Nicholas Sherman
